name: Stickhero Love Stickgirl
description: Stickhero, the bat man, must carefully move through the dangerous laboratory and find the golden key. After finding the golden key, you can use it to rescue Stickgirl from the cage. Don’t forget to collect all the coins in the laboratory. Collect all the coins and pass through the opened door to reach the next level.
instructions: Use the WASD keys to play the game Double jump is available Touch controls are available for playing on mobile devices
